name: GER40_M15_DonchianTrendPullback_v1
hypothesis: On GER40 M15 during European cash hours, pullbacks to EMA20 within a Donchian(40) breakout regime resume the trend with positive expectancy.

entry_rules.long: Close made new Donchian40 high within last 10 bars AND price pulls back to within 0.3*ATR of EMA20 AND EMA20>EMA50 AND RSI(14)>45 AND bullish close
entry_rules.short: Close made new Donchian40 low within last 10 bars AND price rallies to within 0.3*ATR of EMA20 AND EMA20<EMA50 AND RSI(14)<55 AND bearish close

notes: Original trend-pullback construction; avoids Pine reference code.
